annotations.text: High aspect ratio wing for efficient cruise at low Reynolds numbers
Carbon fiber spar with foam core — strength-to-weight optimized
CIGS thin-film chosen over rigid panels for conformal mounting and weight savings
Spanwise wing rotation mechanism enables solar tracking during water rest
Metacentric height drove this hull cross-section for roll stability
Step hull reduces hydrodynamic drag during takeoff run
PX4 flight controller with custom mixer for seaplane control surfaces
MPPT controller + BMS manages solar charge and battery health autonomously
Modular payload bay — camera, sensors, or sampling equipment
CG-balanced mounting to maintain flight envelope across payload configs
